name: @salary-hijacking/ui
description: Salary Hijacking platform headless UI components and design tokens for payroll, budget, expense, savings, notification, growth, community, ads, and admin surfaces.
author: Salary Hijacking Platform

scripts.prepare:ui: corepack pnpm run prepare:barrels && corepack pnpm run prepare:tsconfig
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run prepare:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.ui.json --noEmit
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean && corepack pnpm run prepare:ui && tsc -p tsconfig.ui.json && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run validate:dist
scripts.validate:dist: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required='dist/index.js dist/index.d.ts dist/components/index.js dist/components/index.d.ts dist/components/CommunityPostCard.js dist/components/CommunityPostCard.d.ts dist/components/DailyBudgetCard.js dist/components/DailyBudgetCard.d.ts dist/components/ExpenseListItem.js dist/components/ExpenseListItem.d.ts dist/components/NotificationRow.js dist/components/NotificationRow.d.ts dist/components/SalaryStatusCard.js dist/components/SalaryStatusCard.d.ts dist/tokens/index.js dist/tokens/index.d.ts dist/tokens/colors.js dist/tokens/colors.d.ts dist/tokens/spacing.js dist/tokens/spacing.d.ts dist/tokens/typography.js dist/tokens/typography.d.ts'.split(' '); const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('[ui] missing dist files:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[ui] dist export map validation passed.');"
scripts.check:exports: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['.','./components','./components/CommunityPostCard','./components/DailyBudgetCard','./components/ExpenseListItem','./components/NotificationRow','./components/SalaryStatusCard','./tokens','./tokens/colors','./tokens/spacing','./tokens/typography','./package.json']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg.exports)); if (missing.length) { console.error('Missing exports: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } for (const [key,value] of Object.entries(pkg.exports)) { if (key==='./package.json') continue; for (const field of ['types','import','default']) { if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || !(field in value)) { console.error('Invalid export '+key+' missing '+field); process.exit(1); } } }"
scripts.check:completeness: corepack pnpm run prepare:ui && tsx -e "import { getCommunityPostCardCompletenessReport, getDailyBudgetCardCompletenessReport, getExpenseListItemCompletenessReport, getNotificationRowCompletenessReport, getSalaryStatusCardCompletenessReport, getColorsCompletenessReport, getSpacingCompletenessReport, getTypographyCompletenessReport } from './src/index.ts'; const reports=[getCommunityPostCardCompletenessReport(),getDailyBudgetCardCompletenessReport(),getExpenseListItemCompletenessReport(),getNotificationRowCompletenessReport(),getSalaryStatusCardCompletenessReport(),getColorsCompletenessReport(),getSpacingCompletenessReport(),getTypographyCompletenessReport()]; const failed=reports.filter((r)=>r.ok!==true || (Array.isArray(r.missing) && r.missing.length>0)); if (failed.length) { console.error(JSON.stringify(failed,null,2)); process.exit(1); } console.log('UI completeness OK: '+reports.length+' reports');"
scripts.check:package: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['name','version','type','exports','files','scripts','devDependencies']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg)); if (missing.length) { console.error('package.json missing '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } if (pkg.name !== '@salary-hijacking/ui') { console.error('Unexpected package name: '+pkg.name); process.exit(1); } if (pkg.sideEffects !== false) { console.error('sideEffects must be false'); process.exit(1); } const text=fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8').toLowerCase(); const bad=['example'+'.com','your'+'-org']; const hit=bad.filter((term)=>text.includes(term)); if (hit.length) { console.error('package.json contains invalid metadata: '+hit.join(', ')); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run check:package && corepack pnpm run check:exports && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run check:policy && corepack pnpm run check:completeness && corepack pnpm run build
